title: Web App Template
description: A **template web application** that provides a simple and efficient starting point for building web applications supporting common features. It can be hosted in the cloud or locally and is accessible from any device via a web browser.

I selected, tested and documented the setup and examples to streamline the process to configure **[RoboJS](https://robojs.dev/)** with **Vite** and **React**, so database support, real‑time state synchronization, API building, task scheduling, ... and other features are available out of the box.
The template reduces setup time, streamlined development workflows, and simplified deployment with Docker and Google Cloud, serving as a robust foundation for new projects.
